codegen.console_subtitle: Switch between DSL, DB, and delete modes on one page with a shared result area.
codegen.package_name_placeholder: Leave blank to let the system generate the zip name automatically
codegen.dsl_placeholder: Paste or edit DSL YAML here
codegen.db_guide_subtitle: Choose the driver first, then fill in the connection string and scan scope. Preview first and generate after confirming the result.
codegen.db_recommended_preview: Run a dry-run preview first to confirm file plans and conflicts before generating.
codegen.db_fast_template_hint: Pre-fill common database connection formats with one click.
codegen.db_schema_placeholder: Optional, used for PostgreSQL and similar cases
codegen.db_mount_root_placeholder: Leave blank for the top-level root menu
codegen.db_table_range_placeholder: Supports comma or newline separation, for example: book, order
codegen.db_table_range_help: Leave blank to scan all tables; prefill a small set of tables first for previewing.
codegen.generate_options_hint: Control whether to overwrite existing files and whether to output frontend and permission policies.
codegen.execute_notes_placeholder: Optional: add delete notes for display only; they are not sent to the backend core directly
codegen.result_subtitle: Preview and generation both return resource-level actions.
codegen.no_result: No preview or generation has been executed yet.
codegen.file_plan_subtitle: Shows the file list derived during database preview.
codegen.risk_subtitle: Shows risk prompts and blocking conflicts from the delete preview.
codegen.conflict_subtitle: Shows overwrite risk and path conflict information.
codegen.audit_subtitle: Records inputs, execution steps, and output statistics.
codegen.preview.name: Name
codegen.delete_preview_required: Please run a delete preview first and confirm the plan, risks, and conflicts before clicking confirm delete.
codegen.delete_messages_subtitle: Summarizes delete preview prompts, execution prompts, and error messages.
codegen.messages_subtitle: Includes dry-run prompts, generation summaries, and validation messages.
codegen.download_preparing_detail: The browser is about to start downloading
codegen.artifact_expired_detail: A new code package needs to be generated again
codegen.artifact_ready_detail: Supports re-download and copying the full URL
codegen.fill_dsl: Please fill in the DSL content first
codegen.db_cannot_identify_module: Unable to identify the generated module, please regenerate first
codegen.db_install_prompt: The manifest for module {module} is about to be installed into the system menu. Continue?
codegen.db_generated_status: Database code has been generated directly into the backend project
codegen.generated_status: Code has been generated directly into the backend project
codegen.downloading: Preparing the download package. Please wait; the browser will start downloading shortly.
codegen.artifact_expired: The current download package has expired. Please run “Generate and download” again to get a new package.
codegen.artifact_ready: The download package is ready. You can download it again or copy the download URL for debugging with the current session.
codegen.switch_db_mode: Please switch to DB mode first
codegen.download_auth_error: Your login has expired; please log in again before downloading the package
codegen.download_notfound_error: The download package does not exist, it may have been cleaned up; please generate a new package
codegen.download_server_error: The download service is temporarily unavailable; please try again later
codegen.delete_execute_confirm: Module {module} will be deleted with a total of {total} items. The current plan contains {warnings} warnings and {conflicts} conflicts. After confirmation, the delete execution API will be called.
codegen.generate_database_download_faile: Failed to generate database download package
codegen.db_generated_waiting_install: Database code generated and waiting for confirmation to install into the system
codegen.install_result_summary: Module {module} has been installed into the system with {total} menus
codegen.delete_preview_complete_conflict: Delete preview complete: the {total} planned items include {conflicts} conflicts; please confirm before executing.
codegen.delete_preview_complete_warning: Delete preview complete: {total} planned items with {warnings} risk warnings.
codegen.delete_preview_complete_normal: Delete preview complete: {total} planned items; you can proceed to confirm execution.
codegen.delete_result_partial_summary: Delete completed, but {skipped} items were skipped and {failed} items failed.
codegen.delete_result_ended_status: Delete execution has ended with status {status}.
codegen.delete_preview_no_extra_risk: Preview note: no additional risk warnings found.
codegen.delete_execute_no_extra_exceptio: Execution note: no additional exceptions found.
codegen.db_validate_driver: Please select a database driver first
codegen.db_validate_name: Please enter the database name first
codegen.delete_validate_module: Enter the module name to delete first
codegen.artifact_expired_short: The download package has expired. Please run “Generate and download” again.
